task_completion.description: The document title 'Post-Incident Review: INC-4092' is present, centered, and formatted as Heading 1.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Post-Incident Review: INC-4092' at the top of the document. It should be centered and appear larger/bolder, consistent with a Heading 1 style in OpenOffice Writer.

task_completion.description: The four required main sections are present and formatted as Heading 1.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the exact headings: 'Executive Summary', 'Incident Timeline', 'Root Cause Analysis', and 'Corrective Actions'. They should be styled as Heading 1 (larger, bold font).

task_completion.description: A summary paragraph explaining the root cause is included.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Read the text under 'Root Cause Analysis' or 'Executive Summary'. It must mention a PostgreSQL deadlock or SQLSTATE 40P01 error affecting the inventory_items table.

task_completion.description: The technical terms 'SQLSTATE 40P01' and 'inventory_items' are formatted in Courier New font.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Locate the terms 'SQLSTATE 40P01' and 'inventory_items' in the text. They should visually appear in a monospace font (Courier New), distinct from the surrounding standard text font.

task_completion.description: A footer containing 'OmniCart Confidential' and page numbers is present.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the bottom margin of the document pages. There should be a footer section containing the text 'OmniCart Confidential' and a page number.

task_completion.description: The document is saved as INC-4092_PIR.odt in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the OpenOffice Writer window title bar; it should read 'INC-4092_PIR.odt'. Alternatively, look for a save dialog confirming the path /home/ga/Documents/INC-4092_PIR.odt.

integrity.description: The agent used Apache OpenOffice Writer to create and format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the Apache OpenOffice Writer GUI (toolbars, menus, page layout view) being used, rather than a plain text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the GUI document creation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check terminal windows to ensure the agent didn't use tools like pandoc, python scripts, or echo commands to generate the .odt file directly.

integrity.description: The document content is properly written and formatted, not just a raw copy-paste of the JSON file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in the document should be written in natural language paragraphs and lists, not raw JSON syntax (e.g., no curly braces or key-value string pairs).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a Post-Incident Review document for incident INC-4092 (Date: 2024-03-15). The root cause is a PostgreSQL deadlock (SQLSTATE 40P01) on the inventory_items table. The document must have the title 'Post-Incident Review: INC-4092' (Centered, Heading 1). It requires four Heading 1 sections: 'Executive Summary', 'Incident Timeline', 'Root Cause Analysis', and 'Corrective Actions'. The terms 'SQLSTATE 40P01' and 'inventory_items' must be in Courier New font. The footer must contain 'OmniCart Confidential' and page numbers. The final file must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/INC-4092_PIR.odt.
